name: captain-os
description: Portable, cybernetic meta-operating system to protect codebase integrity and guide AI coding pilots with autonomous, closed-loop safety gates.
author: Anton Titov

scripts.test: node packages/cli/src/index.js doctor && node packages/cli/src/index.js swarm-score && node packages/cli/src/index.js delivery-calibration --fixtures && node packages/cli/src/index.js agent-lane-lifecycle --outcomes smoke-outcome && node packages/cli/src/simplifier.test.js && node --test packages/cli/src/harness-modules.test.js
